body: This PR disables nsys profiling in buildkite CI, hopefully allowing us to sidestep recent issues with GPU in CI.
title: Disable nsys profiling in buildkite CI

body: This PR changes the default range of latitudes from -80, 80 to -90, 90, so that we have data all over the glob.e
title: Cover entire globe with NetCDF
Adapt interpolation object for GPU runs.
